TestCase z11Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_x = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_x, t1.x, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.x = follow_case_x;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Left circular shift: move first element to the end
    double first = follow_case.x[0];
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        follow_case.x[i] = follow_case.x[i + 1];
    }
    follow_case.x[follow_case.n - 1] = first;
    
    return follow_case;
}
